original_description: CopilotKit v2 hub — operator chat runtime, AG-UI protocol, A2UI surfaces, Mastra/LangGraph integrations, setup, develop, debug, upgrade, and OSS contribute. Use whenever the user mentions CopilotKit, CopilotChat, CopilotSidebar, /api/copilotkit, useAgent, useFrontendTool, AG-UI, A2UI createSurface, agent streaming, runtime 401, license token, v1→v2 migration, or wiring Mastra agents to the operator app — even if they do not say "CopilotKit" explicitly. Load references/ on demand; do NOT load the whole tree. For iPix prod ops start with references/ipix-production.md.

final_description: Use for ANY operator chat / agent-runtime bug, symptom, or build task — even when the user never says "CopilotKit". Trigger on symptom descriptions, not just product names: chat streams text but a frontend tool never fires; useAgent/useFrontendTool/useCopilotAction misbehaves; 401 or connection failures hitting /api/copilotkit or /agent/*/run; an SSE stream hangs and never emits RunFinished; a tool call fails mid-stream; "agent not found" or registry-key mismatches; license token / env var issues; questions about AG-UI or A2UI event order and protocol; wiring a Mastra or LangGraph agent into the operator's copilotkit runtime route; CopilotChat/Sidebar/Popup UI work, HITL interrupts; v1→v2 migration; or contributing to the CopilotKit OSS repo. Covers setup, feature development, debugging, upgrades. Load references/ on demand — never load the whole tree. For iPix production incidents (Vercel, license, prod 401s) start at references/ipix-production.md.

train_results.query: CopilotChat streams text but frontend tools from useFrontendTool never execute
the operator sidebar on /app/shoots throws 401 on GET /api/copilotkit/info — license token is set in vercel but chat won't connect
cloudinary f_auto q_auto transform for product hero images in the operator assets page
useAgent says agent not found — mastra registry key is production-planner but frontend uses default
wire our mastra agent into the copilotkit runtime route at app/src/app/api/copilotkit
infisical run -- npm run dev injects secrets but vite app on 8080 won't start
sse run never finishes — seeing RunStarted but no RunFinished in network tab for /agent/default/run
what's the AG-UI event order when a tool call fails mid-stream?
add a new supabase migration for brand_scores RLS on nvdlhrodvevgwdsneplk
medusa checkout webhook in my-marketplace isn't firing stripe events
mastra workflow in app/src/mastra/workflows needs a new step for shoot planning — no chat UI
explain what react server components are — general next.js question no operator chat

test_results.query: agent is emitting A2UI createSurface ops but nothing renders — do i need runtime.a2ui on CopilotRuntime?
rewrite the gemini structured output schema in supabase/functions/brand-intelligence for DNA scoring
make the dashboard card use shadcn Button variant outline — pure UI tweak in app/components
add CopilotSidebar to the next.js operator layout with useSingleEndpoint false for hono multi-route
need to migrate off useCopilotAction and CopilotKit v1 imports in app/ to v2 /react-core/v2
implement IPI-46 onboarding orchestration — full wiring plan PR workflow verify matrix
node scripts/linear-set-issue-state.mjs IPI-46 Done and update docs/linear/issues checkbox
COPILOTKIT_LICENSE_KEY missing in prod — where does publicLicenseKey go on the provider?
